bg.addMark: Increases background blur when turned on
bg.choose: Choose your favorite picture as your workbench desktop background.
bg.openTPTip: This type of function consumes high performance, please enable it as appropriate.

desktop.effectFlowTip: After turning it on, the page will have a cool falling effect.
desktop.lightTip: Display RGB effects around the workbench window.

message.logoutFail: Account logout failed, please try again!
message.logoutSuccess: Account logged out successfully, please log in again
message.offlineTip: After using offline mode, some entertainment and social functions, such as games, weather, etc., will be hidden.
message.serverTimeout:
Server connection timed out. 
The server may be under maintenance, please try again later.
message.teamTip: After using the minimalist mode, some entertainment and social functions, such as the squad function, will be hidden.

msg.save:
After using performance mode, various interface animations will be turned off, and processes stuck in memory will be cleaned up as much as possible. 
It may cause the opening interface effect to be compromised or application switching to be slow. 
But it can significantly reduce memory, CPU, and GPU usage.

welcome.hello: Welcome to use Pangu cross-chain client to take you to explore the new world of web3!
welcome.netErr: If you encounter network problems, please check the system proxy or wait patiently.
welcome.say1: This client requires the help of back-end computing services.
